author: Vincent Voyer
subject: feat(toggle): Provide a better default widget (#1146)
body:
This update brings:
- default to showing the next user action items count instead of the
current number of displayed hits

which means:
if checkbox is not checked, show: [ ] free shipping (countWhenChecked)
if checkbox is checked, show: [x] free shipping (countWhenNotChecked)
- fix numeric based on and off values (fixes #1096)
- provide `onFacetValue` and `offFacetValue` template data, fixes #919
